title: modifyGroupRequest
description: Schema for modifyGroupRequest in Nuix ECC REST API

groupId.description: id of the group to be modified

groupName.description: optional, new name of the group

description.description: optional, new description of the group

addCustodians.description: optional, array of Custodian Ids to be added to the group

custodianId.description: id of the custodian to be added

removeCustodians.description: optional, array of Custodian Ids to be removed from the group

custodianId.description: id of the custodian to be removed
